summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgentFlow Phase 0 - Foundation & Setup. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI components are working correctly. Dark luxury theme implemented properly with blacks, grays, and gold accents.

issues: Fixed: User display name was not showing correctly due to wrong property path (user_metadata.full_name vs full_name)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows are working: Landing page → Signup → Onboarding → Dashboard → All pages (Chat, Agents, CRM, Analytics, Settings) → Logout. Backend JWT auth is fully functional. The 5 marketplace agents are loading correctly from API.

TestAgentsEndpoints: test_get_marketplace_agents - PASSED (5 agents: Carol, Roberto, Ana, Lucas, Marina)

frontend_tests.landing_page: Hero section, features grid, pricing section, footer, channel badges - all visible
frontend_tests.login_signup: Both forms work, toggle between them, proper redirects
frontend_tests.onboarding: 6 language options with gold highlight selection, continue redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.dashboard: Stats cards, quick actions, empty agents state, plan status bar - all visible
frontend_tests.bottom_navigation: 5 tabs (Chat, Agents, CRM, Analytics, Settings) - all clickable and navigate correctly
frontend_tests.chat_page: Channel filter pills, empty state displayed
frontend_tests.agents_page: 5 marketplace agents displayed (Carol, Roberto, Ana, Lucas, Marina), search and create button visible
frontend_tests.crm_page: 5 kanban columns (New, Qualified, Proposal, Won, Lost), add lead button visible
frontend_tests.settings_page: Profile card, menu items, channel status (4 channels), logout button
frontend_tests.logout_flow: Clears session, shows toast, redirects to landing page

verified_features: Landing page loads with dark luxury theme
Navigation from landing page to login/signup via buttons
Signup flow: Create account → redirects to onboarding
Onboarding: Language selection with gold highlight → Continue redirects to dashboard
Login flow: Sign in → redirects to dashboard or onboarding based on status
Dashboard shows stats cards, quick actions, empty agents state, plan status bar
Chat page with channel filter pills and empty state
Agents marketplace loads 5 agents from API
CRM Kanban page with 5 stage columns
Analytics page with placeholder stats and charts
Settings page with profile card, menu items, channel status, logout button
Logout clears session and redirects to landing page
Backend marketplace agents endpoint returns 5 agents
Backend free plan limit (1 agent) enforced correctly
